qa_pairs.question: What is AlphaFold v3.0?
qa_pairs.answer: AlphaFold v3.0 is a software application for which this page discusses usage instructions.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find the source code and documentation for AlphaFold3?
qa_pairs.answer: The source code and documentation for AlphaFold3 can be found on their GitHub page at https://github.com/google-deepmind/alphafold3.

qa_pairs.question: How should I cite AlphaFold3 if my publication discloses findings from using its source code or model parameters?
qa_pairs.answer: Any publication that discloses findings arising from the use of AlphaFold3's source code or model parameters should cite the AlphaFold3 paper.

qa_pairs.question: What is the DOI for the AlphaFold3 paper?
qa_pairs.answer: The DOI for the AlphaFold3 paper is 10.1038/s41586-024-07487-w.

qa_pairs.question: How do I list the available versions of AlphaFold3 on the clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: You can list the available versions of AlphaFold3 by using the command `avail_wheels alphafold3`.

qa_pairs.question: Is AlphaFold2 still available?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, AlphaFold2 is still available.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find documentation for AlphaFold2?
qa_pairs.answer: Documentation for AlphaFold2 is available here: [[AlphaFold2]].

qa_pairs.question: What dependencies need to be loaded to use AlphaFold3?
qa_pairs.answer: To load AlphaFold3 dependencies, you need to load `StdEnv/2023`, `hmmer/3.4`, `rdkit/2024.03.5`, and `python/3.12`.

qa_pairs.question: How do I download the AlphaFold3 run script for version 3.0.1?
qa_pairs.answer: You can download the run script for AlphaFold3 version 3.0.1 using the command `wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/google-deepmind/alphafold3/refs/tags/v3.0.1/run_alphafold.py`.

qa_pairs.question: How do I download the AlphaFold3 run script for version 3.0.0?
qa_pairs.answer: You can download the run script for AlphaFold3 version 3.0.0 using the command `wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/google-deepmind/alphafold3/23e3d46d4ca126e8731e8c0cbb5673e9a848ceb5/run_alphafold.py`.

qa_pairs.question: What are the steps to create and activate a Python virtual environment for AlphaFold3?
qa_pairs.answer: To create and activate a Python virtual environment, use the commands `virtualenv --no-download ~/alphafold3_env` and then `source ~/alphafold3_env/bin/activate`.

qa_pairs.question: How do I install AlphaFold3 and its Python dependencies within a virtual environment?
qa_pairs.answer: First, upgrade pip with `pip install --no-index --upgrade pip`. Then, install AlphaFold3 and its dependencies with `pip install --no-index alphafold3==X.Y.Z`, replacing `X.Y.Z` with the desired version.

qa_pairs.question: How can I install the latest available version of AlphaFold3?
qa_pairs.answer: You can omit specifying the version (e.g., `==X.Y.Z`) in the `pip install --no-index alphafold3` command to install the latest one available from the wheelhouse.

qa_pairs.question: What happens after running the `build_data` command for AlphaFold3?
qa_pairs.answer: Running the `build_data` command will create data files inside your virtual environment.

qa_pairs.question: How do I validate an AlphaFold3 installation?
qa_pairs.answer: To validate the installation, run the command `python run_alphafold.py --help` from within the activated virtual environment.

qa_pairs.question: How do I freeze the AlphaFold3 environment and its requirements?
qa_pairs.answer: You can freeze the environment and requirements set by running `pip freeze > ~/alphafold3-requirements.txt`.

qa_pairs.question: How do I deactivate the AlphaFold3 virtual environment?
qa_pairs.answer: You can deactivate the virtual environment using the command `deactivate`.

qa_pairs.question: How do I clean up and remove the AlphaFold3 virtual environment?
qa_pairs.answer: To clean up and remove the virtual environment, use the command `rm -r ~/alphafold3_env`.

qa_pairs.question: Where will the virtual environment be created when AlphaFold3 is run within a job?
qa_pairs.answer: The virtual environment will be created in your job instead of a persistent user directory.

qa_pairs.question: How can I obtain the AlphaFold3 model?
qa_pairs.answer: You can obtain the AlphaFold3 model by requesting it directly from Google. More details are available at https://github.com/google-deepmind/alphafold3?tab=readme-ov-file.

qa_pairs.question: What is Google's typical response time for model requests?
qa_pairs.answer: Google aims to respond to model requests within 2-3 business days.

qa_pairs.question: What is an important requirement for AlphaFold3 databases?
qa_pairs.answer: It is important that the AlphaFold3 databases must reside in the `$SCRATCH` directory.

qa_pairs.question: How do I download the fetch script for AlphaFold3 databases?
qa_pairs.answer: You can download the fetch script using `wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/google-deepmind/alphafold3/refs/heads/main/fetch_databases.sh`.

qa_pairs.question: What commands are used to download the AlphaFold3 databases to the `$SCRATCH` directory?
qa_pairs.answer: First, create a directory with `mkdir -p $SCRATCH/alphafold/dbs`, then download the databases by running `bash fetch_databases.sh $SCRATCH/alphafold/dbs`.

qa_pairs.question: Why is it recommended to run AlphaFold3 in stages?
qa_pairs.answer: AlphaFold3 must be run in stages to optimise cost and resource usage by splitting the CPU-only data pipeline from GPU-requiring model inference, and to cache the results of MSA/template search for reuse across multiple inferences.

qa_pairs.question: What are the main benefits of running AlphaFold3 in stages?
qa_pairs.answer: The main benefits are splitting the CPU-only data pipeline from GPU-requiring model inference to optimise cost and resource usage, and caching MSA/template search results to reuse augmented JSON for multiple inferences.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find documentation on AlphaFold3 inputs?
qa_pairs.answer: Documentation on AlphaFold3 inputs can be found at https://github.com/google-deepmind/alphafold3/blob/main/docs/input.md.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find documentation on AlphaFold3 outputs?
qa_pairs.answer: Documentation on AlphaFold3 outputs can be found at https://github.com/google-deepmind/alphafold3/blob/main/docs/output.md.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find documentation on AlphaFold3 performance?
qa_pairs.answer: Documentation on AlphaFold3 performance can be found at https://github.com/google-deepmind/alphafold3/blob/main/docs/performance.md.
